title: Simplis
description: A small selection of Fabric mods that minimally affect the vanilla MC experience.  Can connect to vanilla servers.
body:
Simplis is nothing more than a small, lightly configured collection of mods that is designed to have minimal impact on the gameplay experience of regular Minecraft, only improve performance, aesthetics, and convenience.  This pack was created so I could play single player, the requirements I had were not much, but I wanted to make sure the regular experience was unaffected.

Better third person camera
Performance optimizations for better FPS
Convenience inventory shortcuts/buttons
Shaderpack support
Improved audio and environmental fx

With all these things in mind, I've had a lot of fun playing with this little selection, I hope you do too.
